description: R80 fresh04 same-failure bounded live recheck (fresh04 only) — tooling/config blocker

summary.accounting_note: All 3 matrix runs returned status matrix_error: the rust app probe failed at config validation due to an `__id_in_gui` schema mismatch in the fresh04 subset. Phase probe data (3 runs all timeout class) is captured below as supporting evidence but is not authoritative because the matrix-level comparison did not run.

tooling_blocker.blocker: config validation failed in rust app sampler; matrix script returned exit 1 on all 3 runs
tooling_blocker.root_cause: fresh04 subset retained an `__id_in_gui` field inherited from /tmp/mt_mixed_fresh_subset_reality_neutral.json; rust app config schema rejects the field as `unknown field at /outbounds/0/__id_in_gui`
tooling_blocker.first_run_app_stderr_excerpt: Error: load config: ...; Caused by: config validation failed at /outbounds/0/__id_in_gui: unknown field
tooling_blocker.fix_recommendation: Fresh REALITY/VLESS subset extraction must strip GUI-only fields (`__id_in_gui` plus any other non-rust-schema fields) before live probe; pre-gate dry-run does not catch this because it does not load the config in the rust app process.
tooling_blocker.follow_up: Future fresh-cohort live runs should use a cleaning helper or assert subset key shape against a known whitelist before live probe.

phase_probe_supporting_evidence.note: Phase probe ran in all 3 attempts and produced consistent timeout-class results across direct_reality, transport_reality, vless_dial, and vless_probe_io. This is supporting evidence that fresh04's network-level reachability still times out, consistent with R78 same-failure(timeout). It is NOT authoritative for the same-failure recheck because the matrix-level app probe and compare did not run; the per-run run_health stays run_unknown.

interpretation: Fresh04 only: 3 matrix runs total; no fresh05, no cohort C, no other fresh nodes, no Hysteria2, no WS/plain-VLESS.

All 3 matrix runs returned status matrix_error because the rust app config schema rejected the `__id_in_gui` field carried over from the neutralized REALITY subset; the matrix-level app/compare did not produce label or class data.

Phase probe data (lower-level network dial inside the matrix) shows 3/3 runs at timeout class for direct_reality / transport_reality / vless_dial / vless_probe_io. This is supporting evidence — fresh04 network reachability still times out, qualitatively consistent with R78 same-failure(timeout) — but not authoritative for the matrix-level same-failure recheck.

Classification: C — tooling/config blocker. fresh04 same-failure persistence is not formally re-confirmed by R80 because the matrix produced no run_health-bearing labels. BHV 52/56 unchanged. This is not sampler/dataplane regression and not dual-kernel parity completion.

pre_gate.pre_gate_gap_note: Pre-gate counts (intake + dry-run) all matched, but the dry-run does not load the subset config in the rust app process; the schema mismatch only surfaced at live matrix execution time.

r80.phase_probe_class_consistency: phase probe 3/3 runs timeout class; consistent with R78 same-failure(timeout) at network level, but not matrix-level confirmation

fresh04_r73_r78_r80_comparison.assessment: R80 cannot formally re-confirm fresh04 same-failure status at the matrix level because all 3 runs failed at app-probe config validation. Phase probe data shows 3/3 timeout class, qualitatively consistent with R78 same-failure(timeout); this is supporting evidence only. The matrix-level run_health for fresh04 stays run_unknown.

classification.label: tooling/config blocker; fresh04 same-failure recheck not formally re-confirmed at matrix level
classification.rationale: All 3 fresh04 matrix runs returned matrix_error due to the rust app config validator rejecting `__id_in_gui` in the subset. Phase probe data (3/3 timeout class) is consistent with R78 same-failure(timeout) at the network level but is not authoritative for same-failure recheck because the matrix-level app probe and compare never ran.
classification.next_handling: Fix subset extraction discipline: strip GUI-only fields before live probe. Do not call this sampler/dataplane regression. Do not auto-extend the run cap; if fresh04 same-failure recheck is needed, re-authorize a separate bounded round with a cleaned subset.

redaction_notes: Evidence uses only neutral outbound key fresh04.
Raw tag/server/uuid/public_key/short_id/path/header/server_name/password material remains only in local /tmp inputs and is not committed.
app.stderr excerpt in tooling_blocker is paraphrased to remove the absolute /tmp path; only the schema-mismatch error class is preserved.
